compiled_state.title: Update project docs to reflect review process observability
compiled_state.author: Main
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Update CLAUDE.md and related docs with review-stats.sh command reference, /dso:review-stats skill, and event schema contract reference
**Why**: Future agents need awareness of the new observability infrastructure
**Scope**:
- IN: CLAUDE.md quick reference table, config keys section, architecture section updates
- OUT: New documentation files (contract doc created in Story 1)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md includes review-stats.sh in the quick reference table and /dso:review-stats in the skill list
  <- Satisfies: documentation completeness
- When this story is complete, the event schema contract document is referenced in the architecture section
  <- Satisfies: documentation completeness

comments.body: Story complete: CLAUDE.md updated with review-stats references
comments.author: Main
